creator: markir@paradise.net.nz
text:
This seems to have been fixed sometime in the last few months.

dmesg output instead shows:

(II) ATI(0): [drm] installed DRM signal handler
(EE) ATI(0): [dri] ATIDRIScreenInit failed because of a version mismatch.
[dri] mach64.o kernel module version is 1.0.0, but version 2.x is needed 
(with 2
.x >= 2.0).
[dri] Disabling DRI

so seems ok to close (noting system data):

#uname -a
FreeBSD ikker.markir.net 7.0-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-PRERELEASE #10: Fri 
Oct 12 22:42:23 NZDT 2007     
postgres@ikker.markir.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/STANDARD  i386

# pkg_info | grep xorg-7
xorg-7.3_1          X.Org complete distribution metaport

Thanks!
